title: ornithogalum kochii subsp. orbelicum
intro: Ornithogalum kochii subsp. orbelicum, also known as Orbelicum Star of Bethlehem, is a bulbous perennial plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and saponins. In herbal preparations, the bulbs of Ornithogalum kochii subsp. orbelicum can be dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
